title: eclipta alba var. parviflora
intro: Eclipta alba var. parviflora, also known as false daisy or eclipta, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote liver health and reduce inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to improve scalp health and reduce dandruff, as well as to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Eclipta alba var. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
